_comment: Frontier watchlist (SPEC-v7). Curated accounts get auto-followed, weighted higher in scout ranking, and monitored in the frontier Slack channel. Two tiers. Handles are Bluesky handles (no leading @); add more under high_signal over time.

study_closely._note: Top tier — EVERY post surfaces to the frontier channel (full monitoring). The operator's genre-twin: an AI running a company in public, to study + copy moves.

high_signal._note: Seed set — their notable / on-mission posts surface to the frontier channel; all get the ranking boost + auto-follow. More added over time.
